event_info: 138.6kph; Samson backs away a bit to drive with hard hands. The full ball shapes in a bit and the batter ends up inside-edging it towards silly mid-on
1 run; 140.1kph; another inswinger; pad-lined; Samson fails to make contact with his flick. The ball dribbles towards square leg off his pad and CSK get off the mark
Ruturaj Gaikwad shuffles a bit; closes the bat-face to gently nudge this length ball towards midwicket
beaten! Pitched up delivery outside off; not much feet movement from Samson who looks to drive through the covers. The ball whizzes past the outside edge

edge and four! Full again around off; Samson - with cemented feet - drives hard. Gets a fat outside edge that goes between the keeper and the short third man fielder. Races away to the third man fence. No slip; but don't think it would have gone to first slip
139.6kph; decks in from a short of a good length; Samson turns it to backward square leg off the inner part of the bat
over the wicket; length ball on off; Samson plays with soft hands to tap it towards point
140.5kph; fullish ball on off; defensively pushed to cover-point
FOUR; 141.6kph; Burger errs with his line. Fraction short; hint of inswing; the line is too straight though. Gaikwad misses the glance and the ball runs away to the fine leg fence off the thigh
138.9kph; nips in a shade from a length; beats Gaikwad's defence on the inside edge and hits him on the pad
139.1kph; wayward from Burger. Inswinger alright but the full ball is down leg; Gaikwad swings and misses

yes-no-yes. On a length and around off; nips in a bit; Gaikwad plays with soft hands. The ball dribbles gently towards the keeper off the inside edge and Samson calls his partner through for a quick single

ball_event: out Bowled!! Knocked him over! The off-stump has been removed. Cracking delivery from Nandre Burger and he's rightly pumped. Jumps and punches the air in delight. 140.2kph
event_info: just a fraction fuller than a good length and he gets it to move away from the right-hander. Samson shapes to play across the line and misses it altogether as he doesn't account for the movement. The ball crashes into the off-stump and Samson departs for a low score on his debut for CSK. Sanju Samson b Nandre Burger 6(7) [4s-1]
Gaikwad is half-forward to push-drive and inside-edges this length ball to the right of the bowler
fuller outside off; driven crisply off the front foot but he can't find the gap through the covers
full on off; knocked to mid-on
Gaikwad exposes all his stumps by backing away now. Jofra Archer targets the stumps from a short of length and that's been chopped to backward point off the under-edge. Four dots in a row
overpitched outside off and Ruturaj Gaikwad latches onto it. The CSK captain leans forward and caresses the drive through cover-point. First boundary for Gaikwad and that should get him going
137kph; inswinger that further seams down leg; Gaikwad heaves and misses. Dhruv Jurel dives to his left to make a good stop; saves four there

ball_event: out Bowled!! Gone! CSK lose both their openers cheaply. It's full
event_info: quick and on the stumps at 143.3kph; Gaikwad backs away to access the off-side. Moves a tad too much and misses a straight ball. Hears the death rattle and walks back to the dressing room. CSK rocked early. Ruturaj Gaikwad b Jofra Archer 6(11) [4s-1]

ball_event: out Caught by Dhruv Jurel!! Burger is celebrating
event_info: the umpire is unmoved and RR have reviewed it. Head-high bouncer from Burger. Gets big on the batter who pulls awkwardly. No room on offer as well. It's close to the gloves. Let's see what UltraEdge says. Big spike on UltraEdge when the ball is near the right thumb. So; it's off the glove. Successful review and Mohit Krishnadas has to overturn his decision. Ayush Mhatre departs for a golden duck and CSK are in a spot of bother. Ayush Mhatre c Dhruv Jurel b Nandre Burger 0(1)
143.7kph; length ball on off; defended into off. No hat-trick for Burger
139.8kph; nip-backer; Sarfaraz Khan hangs back in the crease and is surprised by the inward movement. Gets beaten on the inside edge and is struck outside the line of the off-stump
Sarfaraz Khan gets off the mark with a confident pull shot! Short ball; hip-high; Sarfaraz spots the length early; swivels and pulls over midwicket

wow! Sarfaraz Khan gives the charge to the bowler. Dances down the pitch; moves leg-side in the process and swings across the line to flick this length ball over backward square leg. The ball has the wings to go over the boundary rope
there's still some inward shape for Burger; the line is down leg though. Sarfaraz flicks and misses

RR appeal; turned down by the umpire and RR decide against the review. Another superb delivery from Burger. Pacy length ball; Sarfaraz Khan ends up playing outside the line of it as he's stuck in the crease. The ball beats the inside edge; hits the pad before going into the keeper's mitts. Ball-tracking shows it to be going over the off-stump
full ball; pushed back to the bowler
inswinger down leg; Short flicks and misses
117.2kph; full on off; Short pushes to cover
132.6kph; width on offer; Short cuts hard but straight to backward point
pace-off delivery; Short gets forward and pushes to cover-point
short of length; Short pulls to deep backward square leg

130.6kph; short ball down leg; Sarfaraz Khan goes after it with a pull shot. Hits him high on the bat and bottom hand comes off the handle. But he's hit it well wide of the man at 45. Sarfaraz has come out all guns blazing
102.6kph; Sandeep starts with a slower ball on the pads; Short flicks to backward square leg
120.4kph; good length on the stumps; Sarfaraz Khan turns it to square leg

ball_event: out Caught by Yashasvi Jaiswal!! Soft dismissal. 122.6kph
event_info: innocuous length ball on leg; Short is early to clip and chips it straight to midwicket. Jaiswal takes the catch but he isn't happy with something - probably didn't spot it as well as he would have liked to. CSK lose their fourth wicket inside the 6th over. Matthew Short c Yashasvi Jaiswal b Sandeep Sharma 2(7)
122.5kph; short ball; Kartik Sharma gets off the mark in IPL by walking across and pulling it to deep square leg
121.3kph; full on off; Kartik Sharma knocks it along the ground to long-on
slower ball to end the over. Full on off; Sarfaraz spots it late and decides to defend it back to the bowler
over the wicket; full delivery drifting in a bit; driven back to the bowler
102.8kph; quick and on a length; tapped towards cover for a quick single
102.3kph; fraction short; Sarfaraz Khan gets low and wristily pulls it to deep midwicket
101.7kph; darting in on a short of length; worked through midwicket
103.5kph; width on offer; Sarfaraz cuts to deep backward point

104.4kph; a drag down from Ravi Bishnoi and Kartik Sharma puts it away. On seeing the length on the shorter side; Kartik goes on the back foot to play an aerial pull shot. Gets a lot of height clears the fence as well as he dispatches it over deep square leg
92.7kph; holds a bit on a length outside off; chopped to backward point

ball_event: out Lbw!! Sarfaraz Khan has been adjudged lbw. He has a chat with Kartik Sharma and reviews. 89.3kph
event_info: a bit slower from Jadeja and Sarfaraz gets low to play a premeditated sweep shot. He gets really low and fails to make contact. Gets hit around the right arm - just below the shoulder. UltraEdge confirms no bat. Over to ball-tracking and it's three reds! Jadeja strikes with his second ball and he's removed Sarfaraz who was looking to be aggressive. It was bowled slower. The ball-tracking; however; predicted the ball go on straight. CSK have now lost half their side. Sarfaraz Khan lbw b Ravindra Jadeja 17(12) [4s-2 6s-1]
Dube needs no sighters. It's full and in the slot from over the wicket. Dube's eyes light up on seeing that. Gets under it as he bends his back leg and bludgeons it over long-on for a 75m six
Jadeja pulls his length back and the line is marginally outside off; Dube wafts and misses
dabbed to short third man

ball_event: out Caught by Ravi Bishnoi!! Ravindra Jadeja gets his man! Second wicket in the over for the former CSKian. 98.2kph
event_info: it's on a fullish length wide of off. Dube tries to go after it with a lofted hit but the timing goes awry. Hits it straight down long-off's throat and Dube is distraught as he walks back. Shivam Dube c Ravi Bishnoi b Ravindra Jadeja 6(4) [6s-1]
full outside off; driven along the ground to long-off
googly; Kartik Sharma makes room to cut it straight to backward point
103.7kph; full outside off; pushed towards cover
94.3kph; flat ball on a length; defended back to the bowler
94.7kph; full delivery; Jamie Overton gets off the mark by flicking it to midwicket
103.8kph; cut to the left of deep backward point where Vaibhav makes a sliding stop
91.9kph; lands on a length around off-middle and spins past the defensive outside edge of Kartik
92.3kph; straighter line and Kartik Sharma defends off the front foot
91.7kph; Kartik Sharma is half-forward to push this fullish ball towards backward point. Overton calls for a risky single and luckily for him; the throw isn't accurate
there's a slip in place now. 94.4kph; full on off; blocked
95.6kph; Overton breaks the shackles with a maximum. He shimmies down the track; moves leg-side in the process and makes superb contact as he lofts this fullish ball over long-off
quicker and shorter; turned to square leg
128ks short of length delivery; Overton ekes out an inside-edge as he attempts the tuck; the ball hits the back thigh and drops to the off-side. Overton suggests there was a bit of extra bounce
slower ball but sprayed down leg; Kartik tries to help it along but too far for him
off-pace delivery; Kartik nudges it into the vacant mid-wicket pocket and races back for the second

ball_event: out Lbw!! CSK slip further. Maiden IPL wicket for Brijesh Sharma. Riyan Parag can do no wrong today. He brings back Brijesh and gets a wicket. Full and straight delivery
event_info: Kartik falls over as he attempts the flick and fails to make contact; struck in line with the stumps and ball-tracking showed it to be smashing into leg-stump. We are into the bowlers now.. Kartik Sharma lbw b Brijesh Sharma 18(15) [6s-1]
132.4ks short of length delivery; Noor rides the bounce and fends it down the pitch
131.1ks bouncer and Noor decides to take it on; but the ball keeps climbing and flies over the top-edge`
105.7ks slower ball around off; Noor carefully defends to point
95.6ks fullish delivery around off; Overton drives to long-off
91.7ks tossed up on off; Noor eases it to long-off
sliding in with the angle; Overton misses the tuck and is struck on the under side of the thigh pad
drifting in as Overton moves away; worked in front of square on the leg-side and the pair scamper back for the second
1 run; darted down leg; Overton misses the pull and the ball deflects off the thigh pad to short fine
83ks very slow and bit of away turn; Noor reaches out and pokes it towards short third
fullish delivery outside off; Overton leans forward and eases it through extra cover. Nothing but a push and the ball is racing towards the fence. Parag hunts it down from mid-off and saves a run
full pitcher close to off; Noor pushes it firmly to mid-off
shortens the length and gets it to move away; Noor is nowhere close to connecting with the pull shot
pacy short ball - 141.8ks banged into the pitch; Noor takes it on and goes for the pull instinctively; but the ball flies over the top-edge and Dhruv Jurel has to leap full stretch to glove that

ball_event: out Caught by Dhruv Jurel!! CSK are eight down. Archer comes back and picks up his second. He set-up Noor smartly there. One full pitcher
event_info: couple of short balls and now the sucker delivery - full and outside off; Noor goes for a booming drive but he's not close to the ball; stays leg-side and has to reach; only manages an outside-edge and Jurel does the rest behind the stumps. CSK in danger of being bowled out inside 20 overs. Noor Ahmad c Dhruv Jurel b Jofra Archer 1(9)
144.6ks back of a length delivery outside off; Henry throws his bat and is beaten on the outside-edge
137.3ks angled in from round the wicket; Overton works it with soft hands to mid-wicket and Henry rushes back for the second
backs away and Burger follows him with a back of a length delivery; defended back to Burger
137.5ks back of a length outside off; Overton sees the width and throws the kitchen sink; loses his grip on the bat and also does not make contact
uhhh! 138.2ks back of a length delivery and rears up sharply; Overton is surprised by the extra bounce; the ball goes past the bat and hits the back arm. That's going to hurt..
sprays the short ball down leg; Overton swivels and does not connect with the pull
140.5ks good length ball on off; Overton defends towards cover and does not risk a quick single
short and banged into the surface; Overton toe-ends the pull through mid-wicket and retains strike
117.2ks slower delivery around off; Overton eases it to sweeper cover
126.6ks bouncer outside off; Henry goes for the pull and has to fetch it; misses and the ball flies over the top-edge
111ks high full toss below the waist; Henry tucks it to mid-wicket. He missed out there..
streaky! 115.2ks off-pace back of a length delivery; Henry has a swipe across the line and gets a thick top-edge; the ball flies over a leaping Jurel and races to third man
105.3ks slower ball outside off; Henry drags it off the inner half to long-on
106.4ks off-pace delivery dug in; Overton waits and pulls towards deep mid-wicket; Jaiswal makes a diving stop
quicker and attacking the stumps; Overton stays back and squeezes it off the inside-edge to square leg
googly around leg; Henry misses the glance and is struck on the thigh pad

ball_event: out Caught&Bowled!! Bishnoi has his first. Soft dismissal. Henry stands there with his head down. CSK are nine down. Another wrong 'un but this is slower and dips on the batter
event_info: Henry wanted to drive but ends up chipping it straight back; Bishnoi reverse cups it safely and lands on his back. Matt Henry c and b Ravi Bishnoi 5(7) [4s-1]
102.6ks flatter delivery outside off; Kamboj knocks it to cover
strays down leg; Kamboj misses the glance and the ball brushes the pad on the way to Jurel
googly that spins in; Kamboj leans forward and helps it along towards short fine
140.2ks short ball outside off; Overton pulls and misses. The extra bounce takes it over the top-edge
once more short and banged into the pitch; Overton moves away and attempts the pull this time; but still can't make contact
uhhh! That was close. High full toss but below the waist; Overton shuffles across and tries to scoop; misses and the ball wasn't far from clipping the bails

138.6ks goes back to the short stuff and Overton is once again missing the pull. Archer has something to say to his England team mate. But Overton checks with the square leg umpire for height; it is a legal delivery
full and attacking the stumps; Overton moves away and throws his bat on the big shot; slices it over backward point and the ball has enough to trickle into the rope
speared into the blockhole; Overton digs it out to mid-off and retains strike
CSK go past 100. Slower ball dug into the surface; Overton missed a few pull shots off Archer but not off Sandeep; the top-edge flies over short fine and races to the fence
floaty delivery outside off; Overton drags the heave to long-on and decides to take the single
1 run; strays down leg; Kamboj misses the glance and the ball deflects off the pad; Jurel dives to his left and parries it away; just a single
in the air and over Sandeep. Off-pace delivery and Overton is deceived completely; he is through the shot early and chips it straight back. Sandeep leaps to his right but the ball evades his grasp
122.4ks back of a length delivery; Kamboj knocks it in front of long-on and crosses over
123.8ks fullish delivery on leg; Overton flicks to deep mid-wicket and keeps strike
118.7ks slower short of length delivery; Overton chops the cut to sweeper cover
141.7ks back of a length delivery; Kamboj defends down the pitch. Burger has overstepped. Free-hit coming up..
slower ball angling down leg; Kamboj swings even as the bottom hand comes off the bat handle; but the pull is good enough to clear backward square and race away
1 run; slanted in; Kamboj is hurried on the flick and misses; the ball drops off the thigh pad to the off-side
on a length and outside off; Overton drives to long-off
140.5ks back of a length delivery; Kamboj has a tentative poke and the outside-edge flies through the vacant slip cordon. Third man is pretty fine and hence only a single
1 run; short ball angled in; Overton takes it on and misses the pull. The ball hits the helmet and lobs towards short fine. This has been a fighting effort from Overton

smashed! He's nailed that. Sandeep goes short and into the pitch; sits up nicely as Overton backs away; gets it right in the arc and he does not hold back - hammers the pull flat and all the way over deep mid-wicket
122.5ks full and close to yorker length; Overton digs the drive out to long-off and has to settle with a single
off-pace delivery; Kamboj works it into the mid-wicket and brings Overton back on strike

ball_event: out Jamie Overton Run Out!! 1 run completed. CSK are bowled out for 127. Complete confusion from Overton. He miscues the heave straight to deep mid-wicket and was reluctant to go for the single
event_info: but responds as Kamboj was more than halfway down. He's then not sure to go for the second or not as he ambles across for the first run; makes a late call to go for the second and is caught short. Hetmyer was a bit casual with getting to the ball and releasing it; which might have prompted Overton to go for the second; but the throw was good to Jurel and he catches Overton well short of the crease. Jamie Overton run out (Shimron Hetmyer/Dhruv Jurel) 43(36) [4s-2 6s-2]
130.1kph; over the wicket; short of length outside off; cut to backward point. A misfield from Sarfaraz allows Jaiswal to get off the mark with a couple of runs
132.1kph; back of a length delivery; leg-lined; tucked to backward square leg

dropped! Shortish ball; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi wants to go after it with a pull shot. Miscues off the bottom part of the bat. Kartik turns around and runs back from midwicket; outstretches and gets both hands on it but fails to hold onto it. He then chases the dribbling ball; slips and ends up kicking the ball to the fence. Sloppy!
there you go! Henry bowls another one on the shorter side. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi gets into a better position to slam the pull over deep midwicket. This is how he's going to bat
same length but it's a slower one; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi doesn't spot it and swings hard across the line. Splices up in the air but luckily for him; the ball falls wide of backward point
18 runs off the opening over! Henry errs with his line and ends up straying this length ball onto the pads and Jaiswal glances it to fine leg

1 run; big shout for lbw; Khaleel is almost pleading; Kumar Dharmasena is unmoved. Ruturaj has a wry smile as he reviews. Pacy inswinger from over the wicket; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi doesn't account for the inward movement as he looks to flick. Beaten on the inside edge and is rapped on the back thigh. Ball-tracking shows it to be going over the leg-stump. CSK burn a review
fuller than a good length; Jaiswal gets forward to drive it to mid-on off the inner half of the bat
nice ball from Khaleel. 136.7kph; good bounce from a length and the ball moves in off the deck as well. Jaiswal is half-forward for a tentative push and is lucky not to get an inside edge on it
Khaleel goes fuller and the ball holds its line outside off; a watchful leave from Jaiswal follows
width on offer; chopped down to third man
in the air; safe and four! On a length and just outside off; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi throws his arms at it and slices it over point for a one-bounce four
135.6kph; short of length; punched to extra cover
short of length outside off; 134.7kph; scythed to deep backward point
118.9kph; pace off and on the shorter side outside off; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi flays it over backward point. The man in the deep takes it on the bounce
133.6kph; Henry offers width and Jaiswal chops it down to third man

121.1kph; slower ball on a length outside off. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi sees it coming. Clears his front leg; waits for it and there come his quick hands to superbly slash it over deep backward point. Incredible the way he could generate so much power. The man at deep backward point meanwhile is a mere spectator
guided behind square on the off-side and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi will keep the strike
137.7kph; yorker length; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi shapes to flick and inside-halves to deep square leg
Jaiswal wants to join the party as well. It's a length ball and Jaiswal decides to smack it downtown. Hits him high on the bat but he's muscled it over straight mid-off for a boundary
fraction shorter and Jaiswal ends up inside-edging it onto his pad
136.2kph; opens the bat-face and dabs this short of a good length ball straight to short third man
136.6kph; in-angling back of a length delivery; a swivelling Jaiswal miscues the pull to midwicket
134.4kph; fuller ball attacking the stumps and Jaiswal flicks it away to deep square leg

134.9kph; Anshul Kamboj starts with a good ball. Lands it on a length around off and gets it to nip away. Jaiswal drives and even before his front foot gets into a proper position and ends up getting beaten on the outside edge
130.4kph; Kamboj pulls his length back and that's been nudged to midwicket
134.1kph; nicely played by the youngster! Short and wide of off; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi arches back and uses the bowler's pace and angle to wristily elevate it over the short third man

134.8kph; the boundaries keep coming. Length ball outside off; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi clears his front leg to swing hard across the line. Thick inside edge eludes the leg-stump and runs away to fine leg for four more
135.5kph; short of length with no room on offer; bunted to mid-on

he's hit that with disdain! 132kph; fuller than a good length; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi clears his front leg; sets a strong base and smashes it over long-on with a big backlift. Fifty up for RR in the fifth over
FOUR; Jaiswal tries to reverse-sweep Noor first ball. The line is down leg; no contact made; the keeper can't stop it either and the ball runs away to the fence
97.4kph; short of length; punched towards wide mid-off
95.7kph; quick googly; Jaiswal punches it to long-on
high and handsome! 97.9kph; length ball; looked like the googly. Sooryavanshi once again clears his front leg to bludgeon it over long-on
15-ball fifty for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi! Wow; this is incredible hitting from the 15-year-old. Noor goes fuller and Vaibhav brings his wrists into play as he launches it over long-on
shorter; quicker and straighter; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi pulls behind square on the on-side for a couple of runs
133.7kph; short of length; Jaiswal taps it towards backward point and gives the strike to the half-centurion

ball_event: out Caught by Sarfaraz Khan!! Vaibhav Sooryavanshi holes out! He stands in disbelief before taking the long walk back. End of a fantastic knock nevertheless from the left-handed opener. It's a length ball outside off and Vaibhav's quick hands come into play as he flays it over cover. Makes good contact but he's hit it flat. Sarfaraz
event_info: the man in the deep; runs in and collects with both hands as he dives. Makes a tough catch look easy. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Sarfaraz Khan b Anshul Kamboj 52(17) [4s-4 6s-5]
length ball angled in; turned to midwicket
tries to steer this length ball to third man and gets beaten on the outside edge
tucked through square leg
133.8kph; length ball outside off; Jurel pushes at it and bottom-edges. The ball hits the turf and goes towards the keeper
117.9kph; yorker length; pace off as well; Jaiswal jams it to cover
back of a length; Dhruv Jurel shapes to pull and miscues it back to the bowler as it hits the splice of the bat
shot! 143.1kph; full on leg and Dhruv Jurel flicks it beautifully through midwicket. The placement is perfect as well
poor ball and punished. Shortened length; the line is down leg; Dhruv Jurel swivels and pulls hard to send it to the long leg fence. No chance for fine leg to even get close to it
137.6kph; short of length outside off; steered to third man
just past the keeper! 141.1kph; hard length angled across; Jaiswal arches back and uses the bowler's angle to cheekily steer it to the left of the leaping Samson. 14 runs off the over

Rajasthan Royals want to finish this quickly. Boundaries continue to flow.. Kamboj misses his line - full delivery but on middle and leg; Jurel whips it with a strong bottom hand and almost sends it the distance; one bounce and over the wide long-on fence
nothing going right for CSK. Fullish delivery around off; Jurel prods forward and squirts an inside-edge past short fine. Khaleel gives chase and drags the ball along with him into the rope

ball_event: out Bowled!! Dragged on! But Kamboj is not complaining. He's pumped and celebrates the wicket with a fist pump. Jurel tried to be cheeky - shuffled across his stumps and tries to play the scoop
event_info: but only manages to drag it onto leg-stump. He had got a couple of fours and could have knocked it around; but RR are looking at the NRR. Dhruv Jurel b Anshul Kamboj 18(9) [4s-4]
133.5ks fullish delivery around off; Parag plays it with soft hands and the outside-edge rolls to third man
132.2ks fuller and close to off; Jaiswal pushes it to mid-off
132ks good length ball on off; Jaiswal defends with an angled bat to backward point
136ks back of a length around off; Parag guides it with an open bat face to third man
137.1ks angled into the left-hander; Jaiswal tucks it to mid-wicket and scampers across
132.4ks bouncer around off; Parag looks to ramp it over the keeper but does not make contact. One for the over signals the square leg umpire
fuller than good length; Parag drives on the rise and picks out mid-off
shot! Khaleel goes pace off and into the pitch; 121.4ks short and outside off; Parag reaches for it and slaps it over extra cover. Mid-off was inside the ring and he just had to clear it
just short of backward point. Fullish delivery angling in; Parag is drawn into the drive and slices it uppishly towards Kartik; he bends low and takes it on the half volley
96.1ks flighted outside off; Jaiswal drags it off the inner half to deep mid-wicket
fraction short and spins away; Parag forces it down to long-off
uhhh! Tossed up and Jaiswal winds up for the big shot; he looks to go straight but the ball spins away to beat the outside-edge. Just a hint of turn and that was enough to defeat Jaiswal

did that carry? Yes. Flighted delivery on off; Jaiswal sits down and sweeps; gets more of a top-edge and the ball skies towards deep backward square. Henry runs in; slides forward and gets fingertips to it. Tough chance and full marks for the effort
premeditates the reverse sweep and has to adjust to the shortened length; chops it towards short third

whoa! He's nailed it this time. Parag once again for the reverse sweep and this one comes right off the screws. The line was around leg-stump and that played right into Parag's hands; not much followthrough of the bat but the ball sails over deep extra cover

back to back sixes. Jaiswal has struggled for timing today but not this time. He's got it off the middle and there's no catching that. Fullish delivery angled across; Jaiswal stays leg-side and gives himself the space to open his hands; thumps it over long-off and takes RR closer
pushed wider of off-stump; Jaiswal goes hard and drags it off the inner half to mid-wicket; easy couple
shortens the length around off; Jaiswal pulls to deep mid-wicket and settles with a single
full pitcher close to off; Parag drives it down to long-on
125.8ks dug into the surface; Jaiswal rides the bounce and pulls through mid-wicket
bouncer around off; Parag was on his toes as he attempts the ramp but can't make contact. The square leg umpire did not signal the wide but Parag got it overturned
speared into the blockhole; Parag is happy to dig it back to Henry

Rajasthan Royals win by 8 wickets. This is a big win for them. Handshakes all around. Few friendly words between Jaiswal and Gaikwad. Short drifts it in from round the wicket; Jaiswal nudges it into the mid-wicket and ambles across to the other end
